Design Preview

Nadia Inji Khan

Four visual directions for your academic site. Each links to a full preview.

V1

Alchemy

Dark luxury. Tiled 8-pointed star pattern in gold on near-black. Cinzel serif. Cinematic and theatrical.

View Design →
V2

Andalus

Deep cobalt hero with diamond tile pattern. Josefin Sans geometric type. Architectural and precise.

View Design →
V3

Manuscript

Warm parchment with arabesque interlocking circles. Cormorant Garamond throughout. Scholarly and intimate.

View Design →
V4

Minaret

Clean white ground with deep emerald and a large geometric star ornament. DM Serif. Sharp and editorial.

View Design →
